## One-line annotation

<!-- What is it, and why does it earn a slot? Answer-first, one sentence. -->

## Which stage / section?

<!-- e.g. roadmap/06-tools-and-stack.md → Resources, or skills-check.md -->

## Quality checklist

- [ ] It's a **primary source** or a genuinely better explanation than what's already there.
- [ ] It is **not** promotional / affiliate / SEO blogspam.
- [ ] If the target section is at its ~8-link cap, I've named **which existing link it should replace and why**.
- [ ] License is compatible (MIT/Apache/CC0 to adapt; CC-BY-SA → link + commentary only).
- [ ] I'm not the author, **or** I've disclosed that I am.
